findings.evidence: Roadmap `TauCetiRoadmap/ConformalMapping/README.md` L107-L109 identifies Schwarz-Pick/pseudo-hyperbolic metric as L2; L170-L183 require every L0-L3 Tau Ceti file and PR to cite #33505 and the Mathlib RMT/BranchLogRoot work. `rg -n "33505|RiemannMapping|BranchLogRoot" code/TauCeti/Analysis/Complex/Conformal` returned no hits in this PR.
findings.fix: Add the required #33505 / Mathlib `RiemannMapping.lean` and `BranchLogRoot.lean` coordination note to the file docstring and PR description, including the temporary-shim/refactor intent where applicable.
findings.issue: This new L2 conformal file has no citation or shim/deletion note for the in-progress Mathlib RMT work required by the roadmap for every Tau Ceti L0-L3 file and PR.

summary: The pseudo-hyperbolic API is a single coherent L2 Schwarz-Pick prerequisite, but the PR does not satisfy the roadmap's explicit upstream-coordination condition for L0-L3 conformal material.
